app.errorPersonalAccessTokenEmpty: Personal access token cannot be empty!
app.newFolderNameEmpty: New Folder name cannot be empty.
app.pleaseLoadFile: No files have been selected, please select the file you want to convert first.
app.browserNotSupportH5: Your browser does not support the latest HTML5 technology, please use the new version of the browser.
app.clickOrDragTheFileHere: Please drag the file here (the file is not uploaded)
app.advancedModeTips: Enter the FFMPEG command line, INPUT represents the input file, do not change. For the specific format of the command line, please refer to the FFMPEG document.
app.videoCutTips: Enter the start and end time of the video, the interval -, the format of the time can be 00:00:00 or 00:00:00.00. The default is not cut.
app.videoCroppingTips: Enter the width, height, and start point coordinates of the video clip. The format is: width: height: X coordinate: Y coordinate.
app.videoBitrateTips: Setting the video bitrate controls the size of the output file and the quality of the output video.
app.outputFileSizeTips: Set the size of the output file, which is an approximation, and the final file size is not necessarily the same.
app.deleteConfirmTitle: Do you want to delete this?
app.closeFileConfirmTitle: Do you want to save the changes you made?
app.closeFileConfirmContent: Your changes will be lost if you don't save them.
app.page404Title: 404 error, the file is not found, please try again later
